---
title: "Playoff Spread Model"
author: "Daniel Larson"
date: "2025-10-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r download data}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
NFLData <- read_csv("small_playoff_dataset.csv")

```



```{r - score and vegas line}
game_scores <- NFLData %>%
  select(game_id, home_team, away_team, home_score, away_score, spread_line) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r - team level data (2rows per game)}
pbp_filtered <- NFLData %>%
  filter(!is.na(posteam))    

# ----- aggregate per team per game -----
team_game_summary <- pbp_filtered %>%
  group_by(game_id, posteam) %>%
  summarise(
    total_yards = sum(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    pass_yards = sum(if_else(play_type == "pass", yards_gained, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    rush_yards = sum(if_else(play_type == "run", yards_gained, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    pass_att = sum(if_else(!is.na(pass_attempt) & pass_attempt == 1, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    rush_att = sum(if_else(!is.na(rush_attempt) & rush_attempt == 1, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    comp_pass = sum(if_else(!is.na(complete_pass) & complete_pass == 1, 1, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    total_plays = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # add simple efficiency metrics per team-game
  mutate(
    yards_per_play = if_else(total_plays > 0, total_yards / total_plays, NA_real_),
    yards_per_pass = if_else(pass_att > 0, pass_yards / pass_att, NA_real_),
    yards_per_rush = if_else(rush_att > 0, rush_yards / rush_att, NA_real_)
  )
```

```{r - join 2 datasets}
team_game_with_scores <- team_game_summary %>%
  left_join(game_scores, by = "game_id") %>%
  # determine home vs away by comparing posteam string to home_team / away_team
  mutate(
    home_or_away = case_when(
      posteam == home_team ~ "home",
      posteam == away_team ~ "away",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

```

```{r - one row per game, add actual score}
game_level <- team_game_with_scores %>%
  select(
    game_id, home_team, away_team, spread_line,
    home_or_away, posteam,
    total_yards, pass_yards, rush_yards,
    total_plays, pass_att, rush_att, comp_pass,
    yards_per_play, yards_per_pass, yards_per_rush,
    home_score, away_score
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(game_id, home_team, away_team, spread_line, home_score, away_score),
    names_from = home_or_away,
    values_from = c(posteam, total_yards, pass_yards, rush_yards, total_plays, pass_att, rush_att, comp_pass,
                    yards_per_play, yards_per_pass, yards_per_rush),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{home_or_away}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    actual_spread = home_score - away_score,
    predicted_spread = NA_real_
  )
```


```{r - 2025 team level stats}
game_2025 <- game_level %>%
  filter(str_starts(as.character(game_id), "2025"))

team_2025 <- game_2025 %>%
  select(game_id, team = home_team, opponent = away_team,
         points_for = home_score, points_against = away_score,
         total_yards = total_yards_home, pass_yards = pass_yards_home,
         rush_yards = rush_yards_home, total_plays = total_plays_home,
         yards_per_play = yards_per_play_home) %>%
  bind_rows(
    game_2025 %>%
      select(game_id, team = away_team, opponent = home_team,
             points_for = away_score, points_against = home_score,
             total_yards = total_yards_away, pass_yards = pass_yards_away,
             rush_yards = rush_yards_away, total_plays = total_plays_away,
             yards_per_play = yards_per_play_away)
  )

team_2025_summary <- team_2025 %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    games_played = n(),
    avg_points_for = mean(points_for, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_points_against = mean(points_against, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yard_diff = mean(total_yards - (pass_yards + rush_yards), na.rm = TRUE), 
    avg_total_yards = mean(total_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pass_yards = mean(pass_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_rush_yards = mean(rush_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_total_plays = mean(total_plays, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yards_per_play = mean(yards_per_play, na.rm = TRUE),
    point_diff = mean(points_for - points_against, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r - team avg per season}

game_level <- game_level %>%
  mutate(season = str_sub(as.character(game_id), 1, 4))

# Stack home and away into team-level format
team_games <- game_level %>%
  select(game_id, season,
         team = home_team, opponent = away_team,
         points_for = home_score, points_against = away_score,
         total_yards = total_yards_home, pass_yards = pass_yards_home,
         rush_yards = rush_yards_home, total_plays = total_plays_home,
         yards_per_play = yards_per_play_home) %>%
  bind_rows(
    game_level %>%
      select(game_id, season,
             team = away_team, opponent = home_team,
             points_for = away_score, points_against = home_score,
             total_yards = total_yards_away, pass_yards = pass_yards_away,
             rush_yards = rush_yards_away, total_plays = total_plays_away,
             yards_per_play = yards_per_play_away)
  )

# Compute season-to-date averages per team
team_avgs <- team_games %>%
  group_by(season, team) %>%
  summarise(
    games_played = n(),
    avg_points_for = mean(points_for, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_points_against = mean(points_against, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_total_yards = mean(total_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pass_yards = mean(pass_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_rush_yards = mean(rush_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_total_plays = mean(total_plays, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yards_per_play = mean(yards_per_play, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r - team avg home and away}
# create home/away versions of team_avgs
home_avgs <- team_avgs %>%
  rename(home_team = team) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_home"), -c(season, home_team))

away_avgs <- team_avgs %>%
  rename(away_team = team) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_away"), -c(season, away_team))

# join both onto the game_level data
model_data <- game_level %>%
  left_join(home_avgs, by = c("season", "home_team")) %>%
  left_join(away_avgs, by = c("season", "away_team"))
```


```{r - diff real vs avg, points and yards}
model_data <- model_data %>%
  mutate(
    points_for_diff = avg_points_for_home - avg_points_for_away,
    points_against_diff = avg_points_against_home - avg_points_against_away,
    total_yards_diff = avg_total_yards_home - avg_total_yards_away,
    pass_yards_diff = avg_pass_yards_home - avg_pass_yards_away,
    rush_yards_diff = avg_rush_yards_home - avg_rush_yards_away,
    plays_diff = avg_total_plays_home - avg_total_plays_away,
    yards_per_play_diff = avg_yards_per_play_home - avg_yards_per_play_away
  )

```


```{r - train and test}
set.seed(704)
train_index <- sample(seq_len(nrow(model_ready)), size = 0.8 * nrow(model_ready))
train <- model_ready[train_index, ]
test  <- model_ready[-train_index, ]
```


```{r - linear regression model}
spread_model1 <- lm(
  actual_spread ~ spread_line + points_for_diff + points_against_diff +
    total_yards_diff + pass_yards_diff + rush_yards_diff + plays_diff + yards_per_play_diff,
  data = train
)
summary(spread_model1)
test$predicted_spread <- predict(spread_model1, newdata = test)

mae1 <- mean(abs(test$predicted_spread - test$actual_spread), na.rm = TRUE)
correlation1 <- cor(test$predicted_spread, test$actual_spread, use = "complete.obs")

cat("Mean Absolute Error:", round(mae1, 2), "\n")
cat("Correlation with actual spread:", round(correlation1, 3), "\n")

```
```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Stack home and away to team-level long format
team_games_long <- game_level %>%
  select(game_id, season,
         team = home_team, opponent = away_team,
         points_for = home_score, points_against = away_score) %>%
  bind_rows(
    game_level %>%
      select(game_id, season,
             team = away_team, opponent = home_team,
             points_for = away_score, points_against = home_score)
  ) %>%
  arrange(season, team, game_id) %>%
  group_by(season, team) %>%
  mutate(
    recent_form = zoo::rollapply(points_for - points_against, width = 3, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
home_recent <- team_games_long %>%
  select(game_id, team, recent_form) %>%
  rename(home_team = team, recent_form_home = recent_form)

away_recent <- team_games_long %>%
  select(game_id, team, recent_form) %>%
  rename(away_team = team, recent_form_away = recent_form)

model_data_recent <- model_data %>%
  left_join(home_recent, by = c("game_id", "home_team")) %>%
  left_join(away_recent, by = c("game_id", "away_team")) %>%
  mutate(recent_form_diff = recent_form_home - recent_form_away)

```

```{r}
spread_model_recent <- lm(
  actual_spread ~ spread_line + points_for_diff + points_against_diff +
    total_yards_diff + pass_yards_diff + rush_yards_diff +
    points_for_diff:points_against_diff +
    yards_per_play_diff,
  data = model_data_recent
)
test$predicted_recent <- predict(spread_model_recent, newdata = test)
mae_recent <- mean(abs(test$predicted_recent - test$actual_spread))

cat("MAE Recent Form Model:", round(mae_recent, 2), "\n")

```

```{r - predict NYJ vs Panthers}
NYJ <- team_2025_summary %>% filter(team == "NYJ")
CAR <- team_2025_summary %>% filter(team == "CAR")

NYJ_CAR_Wk7 <- tibble(
  spread_line = -1.5,  
  points_for_diff = NYJ$avg_points_for - CAR$avg_points_for,
  points_against_diff = NYJ$avg_points_against - CAR$avg_points_against,
  total_yards_diff = NYJ$avg_total_yards - CAR$avg_total_yards,
  pass_yards_diff = NYJ$avg_pass_yards - CAR$avg_pass_yards,
  rush_yards_diff = NYJ$avg_rush_yards - CAR$avg_rush_yards,
  plays_diff = NYJ$avg_total_plays - CAR$avg_total_plays,
  yards_per_play_diff = NYJ$avg_yards_per_play - CAR$avg_yards_per_play
)

predicted_spread <- predict(spread_model1, newdata = NYJ_CAR_Wk7)
predicted_spread


```
